subject.appearance: Woman seen from behind, sitting in a gaming chair. Long, vibrant blue hair with natural texture and subtle waves. Wearing a comfortable oversized hoodie. Her hands are on a keyboard and mouse.

movement_timeline.action: The woman is focused on the screens, her head moves slightly as she tracks something on the display. Subtle finger movements on the mouse.

environment.location: A cozy gaming room with soft ambient RGB lighting. Multiple large monitors are arranged on the desk.
environment.background_dynamics: The screens display a clean, modern news website with prominent headlines and images, reminiscent of a professional news portal. Soft blue and purple ambient light from the PC case.

lighting.changes_over_time: lighting remains consistent with subtle flickering from the digital content on the screens

temporal_consistency: Blue hair color and texture must remain constant
Monitors layout and screen content must not morph
Hand movements must be anatomically correct

forbidden_elements: morphing, melting geometry, extra limbs, jittery background, plastic skin, anime style, CGI rendering, inconsistent lighting, distorted screens
